# Reproduces image 1: a slightly-tilted rectangular lot where the
# weighted-skeleton path produces spines on only some sides. With the
# offset_carriers flag on, every aisle-facing boundary edge should
# get a spine derived from its own offset, independent of wavefront
# truncation.

polygon outer
(10,0)
(400,30)
(380,300)
(-10,280)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (-10,0)-(400,300), area 107750

generate
----
total_stalls: 168
faces: 15 (boundary: 1, interior: 14)
graph: 24 vertices, 37 edges (perimeter: 18, interior: 19)
regions: 1
